schema.productDescription: ORION is Taypro's upcoming cloud platform for solar plant health monitoring, combining generation and operational data with optional field context from Taypro cleaning robots on site.
schema.offersPrice: Coming soon, contact for early access

hero.title: ORION, Solar Plant Intelligence Platform
hero.subtitle: A generation-aware health layer for utility solar, built to turn inverter and plant data into actionable O&M signals, enriched by Taypro's unique presence on every row through robotic cleaning fleets.
hero.imgAlt: ORION, Taypro solar plant intelligence and health monitoring dashboard
hero.subtitleShort: Generation-aware plant health intelligence enriched by Taypro's robotic cleaning data loop.

intro.title: Plant health intelligence that learns from how your plant actually performs
intro.p1: Most monitoring stops at alarms. ORION is designed to interpret what your generation curves are already saying, performance ratio drift, weather-normalised shortfalls, block-level divergence, and the economic impact in terms your asset team can act on. It complements your existing SCADA and work-management stack; it does not replace them.
intro.p2: Where Taypro robots already clean your site, ORION can fuse scheduled row coverage, fleet telemetry, and optional on-route field capture into the same health model, a data loop competitors cannot replicate without robots on the ground. Pilot programmes are opening for select utility and IPP partners under NDA.

healthKit.title: Plant health monitoring package
healthKit.body: ORION is designed as the intelligence layer on a full plant health stack, not cleaning alone. Field accessories in development include thermal hotspot detection and dust/soiling level sensing, with data feeding NECTYR and ORION alongside robot traverse telemetry.
healthKit.item1: Dust and soiling level sensing at plant scale (in development)
healthKit.item2: Unified data layer with robot coverage and SCADA context

renewalAttach.title: Designed to attach at AMC renewal
renewalAttach.body: ORION is built for plants that already run Taypro robots and NECTYR, not cold-start software sales. Early access and pilots prioritise fleets where cleaning cycles, service history, and labelled telemetry already exist on rails Taypro operates.

highlightsSection.title: Capabilities designed to impress operators, without publishing our playbook

0.title: Generation-native baselines
0.body: Continuous learning from plant generation history to surface PR deviation, soiling loss indicators, and degradation trends, with weather and seasonality factored in at portfolio scale.

1.title: Block & string health signals
1.body: Rank underperforming zones early, from combiner to block level, with executive views for revenue-at-risk and technician views for targeted investigation, without exposing proprietary model architecture.

2.title: Robot-enriched field context
2.body: Correlate cleaning cycles with yield recovery, map row traverse coverage to generation blocks, and explore optional sensing payloads during scheduled robot routes, including thermal anomaly hints where deployed.

3.title: Built for Taypro ecosystems
3.body: Designed alongside NECTYR fleet operations: one vendor for waterless cleaning, fleet visibility, and plant intelligence. Early access includes integration workshops with your SCADA and O&M teams.

useCasesSection.title: Where ORION creates the most value

0.title: Utility IPPs & asset owners
0.body: Portfolio dashboards that translate raw MWh into prioritised O&M actions, fewer false alarms, clearer capex decisions on which blocks deserve a truck roll.

1.title: O&M contractors at scale
1.body: Standardise health monitoring across many customer plants with exportable evidence for SLA reviews, warranty claims, and owner reporting.

2.title: Plants on Taypro robotic cleaning
2.body: Unlock the full closed loop: robots that already traverse every row, NECTYR that already logs every cycle, and ORION that connects both to generation outcomes.

notify.title: Join the ORION early access programme
notify.subtitle: Share your plant capacity, SCADA setup, and whether Taypro robots are on site. We will respond with pilot eligibility, integration scope, and timeline under mutual NDA.
notify.messagePlaceholder: Plant MW, location, SCADA vendor, robot fleet (if any), main O&M pain points…
notify.thankYouMessage: Our team will follow up on pilot eligibility, integration scope, and timeline under mutual NDA.

related.title: The Taypro stack ORION builds on

1.label: Solar cleaning robots

OrionPage.footerNote: ORION is under active development. Capabilities, integrations, and availability may change before launch. Detailed algorithms and roadmaps are shared with qualified partners under NDA only.
